source: Local-first validation matrix for the CAOS LDA HSI research backend

thesis.en: The repository's primary purpose is local scientific validation over real spectral datasets. The web app is a subsidiary interactive surface that projects a compact, versioned subset of the validated outputs.
thesis.es: El proposito principal del repositorio es la validacion cientifica local sobre datasets espectrales reales. La app web es una superficie interactiva subsidiaria que proyecta un subconjunto compacto y versionado de las salidas validadas.

workflow_stages.title: Acquire and organize raw datasets locally
Preprocess spectra, labels, measurements, and scene metadata
Generate SLIC and other spatial document partitions
Run spectral and topic-space clustering baselines
Train supervised classifiers/regressors where labels or measurements exist
Validate stability, sensitivity, and predictive value
Project compact validated subsets into the interactive web app

representation_families.goal: Discretized magnitude sequences for one-spectrum documents
Band words with normalized count weights for LDA-ready documents
Class, ROI, patch, or superpixel documents
Sample -> region -> spectrum hierarchies for measured datasets

segmentation_methods.goal: Compact first spatial baseline and document generator
Spatial grouping using hyperspectral or PCA features
Reference semantic segmentation overlays where labels or trained models exist

clustering_methods.goal: Reference similarity baseline against spectral libraries
Mixture-oriented baseline for mineral and unmixing scenes

topic_methods.goal: Baseline discrete topic modeling over document representations
Partial membership topic modeling for endmember variability and spatial documents
Guided endmember variability modeling with supervision

requirements: precomputed overlays for SLIC, clustering, semantic segmentation, and topics
family/group-driven workflow rather than flat dataset spam
